ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
🚀 Real-world DevOps projects for aspiring engineers — Beginner to Advanced. Covers AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Jenkins, and more. Hands-on learning with step-by-step guides.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ReSo7200/InstaEclipse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ReSo7200/InstaEclipse
Language: java
An Instagram Xposed module with features like Developer Options, Ghost Mode, Ad-Free browsing, and Distraction-Free Mode.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/interview-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/interview-guide
Language: java
基于 Spring Boot 4.0 + Java 21 + Spring AI + PostgreSQL + pgvector + RustFS + Redis，实现简历智能分析、AI模拟面试、知识库RAG检索等核心功能。非常适合作为学习和简历项目，学习门槛低。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
Language: java
🔥 官方推荐 🔥 RuoYi-Vue 全新 Pro 版本，优化重构所有功能。基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis Plus + Vue & Element 实现的后台管理系统 + 微信小程序，支持 RBAC 动态权限、数据权限、SaaS 多租户、Flowable 工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、MES、IM、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者生发的动力！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/nacos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/nacos
Language: java
an easy-to-use dynamic service discovery, configuration and service management platform for building AI cloud native applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/doris
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/doris
Language: java
Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/dubbo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/dubbo
Language: java
The java implementation of Apache Dubbo. An RPC and microservice framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/fory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/fory
Language: java
A blazingly fast multi-language serialization framework for idiomatic domain objects, schema IDL, and cross-language data exchange.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbeaver/dbeaver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbeaver/dbeaver
Language: java
Free universal database tool and SQL client

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elastic/elasticsearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch
Language: java
Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk
Language: java
Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI 低代码平台，「低代码 + 零代码」双模式驱动：低代码一键生成前后端代码，零代码 5 分钟搭建系统，AI Skills 一句话画流程、设计表单、生成整套系统。内置 AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP插件等，兼容主流大模型。引领「AI 生成 → 在线配置 → 代码生成 → 手工合并->AI修改」开发模式，消除 Java 项目 80% 的重复工作，提效而不失灵活。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kestra-io/kestra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kestra-io/kestra
Language: java
Event Driven Orchestration & Scheduling Platform for Mission Critical Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keycloak/keycloak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak
Language: java
Open Source Identity and Access Management For Modern Applications and Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krahets/hello-algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo
Language: java
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现
